claim: Tier 7.7z-r0 runs compact regression (Tier 1-3 controls) on the edge-of-chaos mechanism: shuffled target hurts MSE (Tier 1), no-learning hurts MSE (Tier 2), ablation baseline loses PR (Tier 3). All controls pass across Mackey-Glass/Lorenz/NARMA10 at 8000-32000 steps, seeds 42/43/44. CRA_EVIDENCE_BASELINE_v2.6 frozen.
caveat: Compact regression on standalone reference implementation. Not full NEST organism regression. Not public usefulness proof. Not hardware/native transfer.
